name: Publish-PSResource

options.name: -ApiKey
options.description: Specifies the API key that you want to use to publish a resource to the online gallery.

options.name: -Credential
options.description: Specifies a user account that has rights to a specific repository.

options.name: -DestinationPath
options.description: Specifies the path where the NuGet package `.nupkg` file should be saved. This parameter can be used in conjunction with the Repository parameter to publish to a repository and also save the exact same package to the local file system.

options.name: -Path
options.description: The path to the module or script file or the path to a folder containing the module or script file to be published.

options.name: -Proxy
options.description: The URL to a proxy server used to access repositories outside of your network.

options.name: -ProxyCredential
options.description: The credentials required to use the proxy server.

options.name: -Repository
options.description: Specifies the repository to publish to.

options.name: -SkipDependenciesCheck
options.description: Bypasses the default check that all dependencies are present in the target repository.

options.name: -SkipModuleManifestValidate
options.description: Skips validating the module manifest before publishing.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet isn't run.

description: Publishes a specified module from the local computer to PSResource repository.
